name: Silvercorp Metals Inc.
description: Silvercorp Metals Inc. is China's largest primary silver producer, operating the Ying Mining District in Henan Province, which comprises multiple underground mines and two processing plants producing silver, gold, lead, and zinc. The Ying District produced 6.9 million ounces of silver in fiscal 2025, generating $299 million in revenue, a 39% increase year-over-year. Silvercorp is also advancing the El Domo copper-gold mine in Ecuador, a fully funded project that entered construction in 2025 with first production expected by end of 2026.
